briefdescription.para: Use the smallest cache capacity.
Use the bigger cache capacity than DocumentBrowser.
Use the biggest cache capacity.
Enumeration for cache model options.
Enumeration for application type.
WebView callback related with http request interceptor.
Callback for getting web database origins.
Callback for getting web storage usage.
Callback for getting form password.
Callback for download started with url.

memberdef.type: std::function< bool(const std::string &, const std::string &, std::string &)>
memberdef.definition: using Dali::WebEngineContext::WebEngineMimeOverriddenCallback = std::function<bool(const std::string&, const std::string&, std::string&)>
memberdef.name: WebEngineMimeOverriddenCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback for overriding default mime type.

parameterdescription.para: for which the mime type can be overridden
mime type that will be overridden
new mime type for web engine.

simplesect.para: true if mime should be overridden by new mime, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Constructor.
Destructor.
Return the cache model type.
Request to set the cache model.
Set the given proxy URI to network backend of specific context.
Get the proxy URI from the network backend of specific context.

simplesect.para: current proxy URI or null if it's not set

briefdescription.para: Set a proxy auth credential to network backend of specific context.

detaileddescription.para:
Normally, proxy auth credential should be got from the callback set by ewk_view_authentication_callback_set, once the username in this API has been set with a non-null value, the authentication callback will never been invoked. Try to avoid using this API.
username
username to set
password
password to set

briefdescription.para: Set the given proxy to network backend of specific context.
Get the proxy bypass rule from the network backend of specific context.

simplesect.para: current proxy bypass rule or null string if it's not set

briefdescription.para: Add CA certificates to persistent NSS certificate database Function accepts a path to a CA certificate file, a path to a directory containing CA certificate files, or a colon-seprarated list of those. Certificate files should have *.crt extension. Directories are traversed recursively.

parameterdescription.para: path to a CA certificate file(s), see above for details

briefdescription.para: Get CA certifcate file path.

detaileddescription.para: It returns an internal string and should not be modified.

simplesect.para: certificate_file path which is set during ewk_context_certificate_file_set or null string otherwise

briefdescription.para: Request for deleting all web databases.
Request for getting web database origins.

parameterdescription.para: callback called after getting web database origins

briefdescription.para: Request for deleting web databases for origin.
Get list of origins that is stored in web storage db.

parameterdescription.para: callback called after getting web storage origins

briefdescription.para: Get list of origins that is stored in web storage db.

parameterdescription.para: callback called after getting web storage origins

briefdescription.para: Delete all web storage.

detaileddescription.para: This function does not ensure that all data will be removed. Should be used to extend free physical memory.

briefdescription.para: Delete web storage database.
Request for deleting all local file systems.
Request to clear cache.
Request for deleting web application cache for origin.
Asynchronous request to get list of all password data.

parameterdescription.para: callback called after getting form password

briefdescription.para: Register callback for download started.
Register callback for mime overridden.
Register callback for intercepting http request.

simplesect.para: This callback is not called on UI thread, so users should be cautious when accessing their data also used on UI thread. No other than WebEngineRequestInterceptor API should be used in the callback.

briefdescription.para: Toggle the cache to be enabled or disabled. Function works asynchronously.
Query if the cache is enabled.

simplesect.para: true is cache is enabled or false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set application id for context.
Set application version for context.
To declare application type.
Set time offset.

parameterdescription.para: The value will be added to system time as offset

briefdescription.para: Set timezone offset.

parameterdescription.para: The value is for daylight saving time use.

briefdescription.para: Set default zoom factor.
Get default zoom factor.

detaileddescription.para: Gets default zoom factor for all pages opened with this context.

simplesect.para: default zoom factor or negative value on error

briefdescription.para: Register url schemes as CORS enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The URL schemes list which will be added to web security policy

briefdescription.para: Register JS plugin mime types. It is applied for all the pages opened within the context. The API is intended to be used by web applications to override default behaviour of the object tag.

parameterdescription.para: The MIME types will be checked by the renderer frame loader to skip creating default frame for the object tags with the registered MIME type.

briefdescription.para: Request for deleting all web application caches.
Request for deleting all web indexed databases.
Delete a given password data list.
Delete whole password data from DB.
Delete all candidate form data from DB.
Notify low memory to free unused memory.

simplesect.para: true on success or false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: A class WebEngineContext for context of web engine.
